## Candidate

Which free MCP candidate is this about?

- [ ] Prompt Risk Review MCP
- [ ] Human Review Gate MCP
- [ ] FAQ Candidate Review MCP
- [ ] AI-Safe CRM Notes MCP
- [ ] Customer Data Masking Checklist MCP
- [ ] Diagnosis Intake Log MCP

## What should improve?

Describe the bug, missing field, confusing output, or workflow need.

## Example use case

Share a public-safe example. Do not include private customer data.

## Expected output

What should the MCP tool return?

## Public boundary check

- [ ] This does not include secrets, tokens, passwords, cookies, or credentials.
- [ ] This does not include private customer information.
- [ ] This does not include private company notes.
- [ ] This does not include MIRAI Memory engine details.
- [ ] This does not request a working memory MCP.
- [ ] This does not include full paid product content.
